Scenario Ideas:

  • You’re from the future and

  • > 1) it’s an accident so now you’re stuck w him

  • >> 1a) you try to convince him you’re from the future

  • >> 1b) you hide you’re from the future

  • > 2) you came back to try and separate him from Bill early

  • smth smth trauma you ran into the forest and got lost blah blah blah you found his cabin and you don’t wanna freeze to death

(this is just me projecting all the scenarios i wanna go through holy fuck) (tbh i wanted to write the time travel scenario specifically but like- how do i write you two meeting for the first time like that without saying what the users doing ☹️ so then i was like- ‘just make it super vague and then maybe ppl will be able to use it for other scenarios too’ and I went ‘good idea, me’ and here we are)

⤷ Tags: Stanford Pines // Gravity Falls // Ford // Ford Pines // Sixers // Journals // Mystery Shack // Dimensional Travel // Multiverse

☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Anyway, he finally emerged from his underground lab and went into the ‘home’ section of his cabin to get something to eat. Ford was only human after all, he needed to force himself away from his work to get sustenance eventually. To be fair he’s probably just gonna shove a plain sandwich down his throat and go back to working. No need to get all fancy with it when his mind is still preoccupied with the latest equation he needed to solve to keep making progress on Bill’s portal. Bill, he internally repeats, a dopey grin making its way onto his lips at the thought of his muse. Even though they had talked the last time he passed out, Ford couldn’t get enough of him. His brain is just.. otherworldly. I love it, he thinks, about to go into another internal monologue on his muse when he’s suddenly interrupted.

Thud, thud, thud.

He stops at the doorway to the kitchen, leaning against it a little as his head snaps towards his front door. Did he just.. hear someone knock? No, that couldn’t be right, no one would be crazy enough to be outside during this major storm and they certainly wouldn’t drive through the damn woods. Yeah, he just heard wrong. Just an auditory hallucination from either hunger, drowsiness, dehydration, or some other thing he’s probably lacking. He kinda lost count. ❞
creator: AyoIdk
